title: BSL Minipacks
description: Clean UI, dense grass, and custom sky color.
body:
![](https://capttatsu.com/img/bslminipacks/projectcover.png)

[**![](https://capttatsu.com/img/bslshaders/projectcheckout.png)**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bsl-shaders)

**ABOUT**

BSL Minipacks is a resource pack for Minecraft: Java Edition which contains small tweaks.  
This resource pack was split into multiple packs, hence the name "minipacks".  
However, all of the packs are now combined into one for ease of installation.  
The latest version (v2) is compatible with MC 1.21+, while v1 is compatible with MC 1.15-1.20.


![](https://capttatsu.com/img/bslminipacks/bn1.jpg)
**UI**  
Simple and clean UI to improve immersion.

![](https://capttatsu.com/img/bslminipacks/bn2.jpg)
**Foliage Tweaks**  
Increased grass and crops density improved cross model to prevent clipping from shader's waving blocks, and random rotation. May impact performance.

![](https://capttatsu.com/img/bslminipacks/bn3.jpg)
**Sky Color**  
Sky colormap which is used for subtle sky color change when using BSL Shaders with vanilla sky color enabled.

**QUICK LINKS**

*   **[capttatsu.com](https://capttatsu.com/bslshaders/)**  is this project's official site, read the detailed description, FAQs and changelog here.

*   Like my work? Consider supporting on **[Patreon.](https://www.patreon.com/capttatsu)**

**AGREEMENT**  
**You're allowed to...**

*   Use this resource pack for taking screenshots and videos.
*   Integrate some features to your own resource pack with my permission.*

**You're not allowed to...**

*   Redistribute the resource pack without my permission.
*   Claim (and rename) my resource pack as your own.
*   Use monetized URL shorteners to my site or files.

\*My resource pack and myself (the author) should be credited clearly, add link to my site if possible.

**INSTALLATION**

* Download and install Optifine or Polytone. (for sky color)
* Download the resource pack.
* Put the resource pack inside .minecraft\resourcepacks.
* Launch Minecraft.
* Open Options, Resource Packs.
* Select BSL Minipacks.
* Put the resource pack inside .minecraft\resourcepacks.
